name: Miss Hammurabi
overview: Park Cha O Reum works as a rookie judge. She is in her mid-20's and follows "an eye for an eye" principle. She does not accept prejudice or blindly follow authority. Dealing with cases, she and her colleagues, including Im Ba-Reun, grow as persons.

trailers.title: Ms. Hammurabi S01 | Trailer | Watch FREE on iflix
